SuperFAISS code at tag v3.0.1 (commit af4d48f) -- channel-capable scratch banks + channel-scoped analytics; v3.0.1 P1 fixes: version header 3.0.1, zero-energy Cosine channel reduction floors to 0 (NN divergence) and the per-channel recall/freeze-with-recall audit skips a zero-energy sampled row instead of aborting. On the v2.5 analytics base. Reference docs synced from the same v3.0.1 tag.
